overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis. The character navigates sunny cobblestone sidewalks, crosses a busy intersection with horse-drawn carriages, and enters a shaded alleyway. The scene features detailed historic architecture with wrought iron balconies, a prominent street clock, and period-appropriate NPCs and vehicles.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from left to right across the view
character turns slightly left to follow the sidewalk curve

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone sidewalk following a woman in a blue dress and a man in work clothes

notable_agents.action: woman in long blue dress walking ahead of the camera
black horse-drawn carriage with driver passing by on the street

entered.detail: three-story historic building with arched windows and wrought iron balcony
wooden park bench on the sidewalk foreground
black wrought iron fence along the property boundary
tall trees with hanging branches overhanging the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny cobblestone sidewalk beside a distinctive yellow stucco building with arched windows. The camera follows a woman in a blue dress past a wooden bench and wrought iron fencing. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the adjacent street, and the character continues walking alongside a stone mansion partially obscured by weeping willow trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with prominent street clock

events.description: exiting the tree-lined sidewalk into the open intersection area
approaching a parked horse-drawn carriage blocking part of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: approaching the street intersection and navigating around a parked carriage to cross

notable_agents.action: man in blue coat and hat standing near the parked carriage
parked horse-drawn carriage with red canopy and white wheels

entered.detail: tall black pole with large circular clock face showing the time
large building with tall columns and extensive cast iron fencing
two-story brick building with commercial signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the tree-lined sidewalk into a wide, sunlit intersection dominated by a tall street clock on a central pole. A large stone mansion with imposing columns stands to the left, while a parked carriage with a red canopy occupies the sidewalk ahead. The character navigates around the carriage and other pedestrians to cross the cobblestone street.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy cobblestone intersection with multiple carriage traffic

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left in front of the camera
second carriage passes by as character continues crossing

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide cobblestone intersection while avoiding moving carriages and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man in red coat and vest crossing the street toward the camera
horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving through the intersection

entered.detail: dark stone building with multiple balconies and arched ground floor windows
row of connected two and three-story buildings with storefronts

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the open intersection where multiple horse-drawn carriages navigate the cobblestones. A man in a distinctive red coat crosses toward the camera while various carriages pass by. The three-story corner building with ornate balconies dominates the right side of the frame as the character approaches the far sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow covered alleyway between historic buildings

events.description: entering deep shadow under building overhangs, lighting becomes significantly darker
large carriage temporarily blocks the view ahead in the narrow passage

agents.ego_description: walking into the narrow shaded alleyway between close building facades

notable_agents.action: man in vest and hat walking toward camera in the narrow passage

entered.detail: shaded walkway under building overhang with wooden support posts
stacked wooden barrels and crates along the left wall
narrow passage continuing into the distance between tall buildings

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow, shaded alleyway where building overhangs block most of the sunlight, creating a low-light environment. Wooden barrels line the left wall while the right side features a covered walkway. The passage narrows significantly as a man in a vest approaches from the opposite direction, and distant carriages are visible at the alley's end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, sun-drenched city sidewalk through a bustling intersection and into a dim, narrow alleyway. It begins beside a yellow stucco building and wrought iron fencing, following a woman in a blue dress past weeping willow trees that partially shade a stone mansion. As the character emerges from the greenery, the scene opens into a wide, sunlit intersection centered around a tall street clock, where the camera navigates around a red-canopied carriage and various pedestrians. The movement continues across the cobblestones through a flow of horse-drawn carriages and past an ornate three-story corner building before turning away from the open light. Finally, the environment shifts abruptly into a shaded alleyway where building overhangs block the sun, narrowing the view to a corridor of wooden barrels and covered walkways.
